Messi's continued excellence underscores Argentina's strength in the competition.

The win marks Colombia's progression through a competitive group stage.

title: Farewell Cape Verde - the underdogs the World Cup will never forget
summary: Cape Verde competed as the World Cup's smallest nation but made a memorable impact before being eliminated by defending champions Argentina. Their underdog story captured global attention throughout the tournament. The team's departure marks the end of a historic World Cup run.
content: Cape Verde may have been the World Cup's smallest nation but they leave the largest impact as they depart following defeat by defending champions Argentina in an epic.

zh.title: 再见佛得角 - 世界杯永远不会忘记的黑马
zh.summary: 佛得角作为世界杯最小的国家参赛，在被卫冕冠军阿根廷淘汰前留下了深刻的印象。他们的黑马故事在整个锦标赛中吸引了全球关注。这支球队的出局标志着历史性世界杯之旅的结束。

title: Argentina overcome Cape Verde in extra-time thriller
summary: Argentina narrowly advanced to the last 16 by defeating Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time, with Cristian Romero's deflected header proving decisive. The match showcased Cape Verde's competitive threat despite being a significantly smaller football nation. Argentina progressed after what appeared to be a genuine upset threat.
content: Argentina overcome a huge scare as they beat Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time thanks to a deflected header from Cristian Romero to advance to the last 16.

zh.title: 阿根廷在加时赛激战中击败佛得角

title: Five and a half hours that left England's World Cup tie in chaos
summary: England's World Cup last-16 match against Mexico faced administrative chaos when kick-off time remained unconfirmed for several hours on Friday. The confusion and anger from fans and officials was eventually resolved through FIFA intervention. The incident highlighted organizational challenges during the tournament's knockout stages.
content: For several hours on Friday, no-one seemed to know when England's World Cup last-16 match against co-hosts Mexico would kick off. BBC Sport tells how a story of confusion and anger - culminating in a Fifa U-turn - unfolded.

zh.title: 五个半小时让英格兰的世界杯比赛陷入混乱

title: 'What a strike!' - Cabral hits brilliant goal to draw Cape Verde level in extra time
summary: Sidny Cabral scored a spectacular goal for Cape Verde in extra time to equalize against Argentina for the second time in the match. The strike demonstrated Cape Verde's attacking capability despite being heavy underdogs. The goal temporarily kept their World Cup hopes alive in a tightly contested encounter.
content: Sidny Cabral scores an incredible goal in extra time for Cape Verde as they equalise for a second time against Argentina.

zh.title: "多么漂亮的一脚！"- 卡布拉尔打入精彩进球，将佛得角扳平加时赛
zh.summary: 西德尼·卡布拉尔在加时赛中为佛得角打入精彩进球，第二次将比分扳平阿根廷。这记进球展示了佛得角尽管是不被看好的球队，但其进攻能力仍然强劲。这粒进球暂时保留了他们在一场激烈对抗中的世界杯希望。

title: Martinez restores Argentina's lead against Cape Verde
summary: Lisandro Martinez restored Argentina's lead during their World Cup knockout match against Cape Verde. The goal proved crucial in Argentina's eventual progression through the tournament. Martinez's contribution helped secure victory in a closely fought contest.
content: Lisandro Martinez restores Argentina's lead against Cape Verde in the knockout stage of the 2026 World Cup.

zh.title: 马丁内斯恢复阿根廷对阵佛得角的领先优势
zh.summary: 利桑德罗·马丁内斯在阿根廷与佛得角的世界杯淘汰赛中恢复了阿根廷的领先优势。这粒进球对阿根廷最终晋级赛事至关重要。马丁内斯的贡献帮助阿根廷在一场激烈的比赛中获得胜利。

title: Argentina stunned as Duarte equalises for Cape Verde
summary: Cape Verde surprised Argentina by equalizing through Deroy Duarte during their World Cup round of 32 match in Miami. The goal demonstrated the African nation's competitive threat against the defending champions. Duarte's strike added mounting pressure on Argentina in an unexpectedly tight knockout encounter.
content: Deroy Duarte stuns Argentina as he equalises for Cape Verde during their World Cup round of 32 match in Miami.

zh.title: 阿根廷遭遇惊人一击，杜阿尔特为佛得角扳平
zh.summary: 在迈阿密举行的世界杯32强赛中，佛得角通过德罗伊·杜阿尔特的进球令人惊讶地将比分扳平。这粒进球展示了这个非洲国家对卫冕冠军的竞争威胁。杜阿尔特的进球在一场出人意料的激烈淘汰赛中增加了对阿根廷的压力。

title: 'Sensational' Messi finish gives Argentina the lead
summary: Lionel Messi opened Argentina's scoring against Cape Verde with a highly praised finish in Miami. The goal marked Messi's strike in an eighth consecutive World Cup tournament, extending his legendary tournament-scoring streak. His early strike set the tempo for Argentina's advancement in the match.
content: Lionel Messi hits Argentina's opening goal against Cape Verde with a "sensational" finish in Miami, as he scores in an eighth consecutive World Cup game.

zh.title: 梅西"惊人"进球帮助阿根廷取得领先
zh.summary: 莱昂内尔·梅西在迈阿密对阵佛得角的比赛中以备受赞誉的表现打入了阿根廷的第一球。这个进球标志着梅西在连续第八届世界杯上的进球,延续了他传奇的世界杯进球纪录。他的早期进球为阿根廷在比赛中的推进奠定了基调。
